patches.before_text: Executive's employment with Company is at will, and either Company or Executive may end the employment relationship at any time, with or without Cause, notice, or reason, subject only to the express severance terms in this Agreement.
patches.after_text: Executive's employment with Company is at will, and either Company or Executive may end the employment relationship at any time, with or without Cause, notice, or reason, subject only to the express severance terms in this Agreement.
patches.ground_span: Executive's employment with Company is at will, and either Company or Executive may end the employment relationship at any time, with or without Cause, notice, or reason, subject only to the express severance terms in this Agreement.

plant_position.fallback_text: Executive's employment with Company is at will, and either Company or Executive may end the employment relationship at any time, with or without Cause, notice, or reason, subject only to the express severance terms in this Agreement.

patches.after_text: Company may not terminate Executive before the end of a guaranteed three-year employment term.
patches.ground_span: Company may not terminate Executive before the end of a guaranteed three-year employment term.
patches.expected_redline_text: Delete any fixed-term employment guarantee and state that employment is at will and may end at any time by either party.

patches.before_text: "Cause" means Executive's material failure to perform assigned duties, violation of Company policy, dishonesty, fraud, misconduct, breach of fiduciary duty, violation of law, material breach of this Agreement, or conduct that materially harms Company.
patches.after_text: "Cause" means Executive's material failure to perform assigned duties, violation of Company policy, dishonesty, fraud, misconduct, breach of fiduciary duty, violation of law, material breach of this Agreement, or conduct that materially harms Company. The counterparty confirms that this requirement is accepted without qualification.
patches.ground_span: "Cause" means Executive's material failure to perform assigned duties, violation of Company policy, dishonesty, fraud, misconduct, breach of fiduciary duty, violation of law, material breach of this Agreement, or conduct that materially harms Company. The counterparty confirms that this requirement is accepted without qualification.

plant_position.fallback_text: "Cause" means Executive's material failure to perform assigned duties, violation of Company policy, dishonesty, fraud, misconduct, breach of fiduciary duty, violation of law, material breach of this Agreement, or conduct that materially harms Company.

patches.before_text: Company may conduct annual compensation and performance reviews in its discretion. Those reviews do not guarantee any future bonus, equity grant, vesting change, title, duties, authority, or continued employment.
patches.after_text: The applicable plan and signed award document expressly authorize acceleration of 50% of the unvested award; no extra-plan equity right is created. Company delivers award notices within 5 days after approval, and any vested-option exercise window stated in the award remains 90 days.
patches.ground_span: The applicable plan and signed award document expressly authorize acceleration of 50% of the unvested award; no extra-plan equity right is created. Company delivers award notices within 5 days after approval, and any vested-option exercise window stated in the award remains 90 days.

plant_position.fallback_text: Company may conduct annual compensation and performance reviews in its discretion. Those reviews do not guarantee any future bonus, equity grant, vesting change, title, duties, authority, or continued employment.

patches.before_text: Severance will be paid only at times and in a manner that complies with Section 409A of the Internal Revenue Code or an available exemption, after the release condition is satisfied.
patches.after_text: All separation amounts will be paid on Company's regular payroll schedule regardless of documentation timing or deferred-compensation requirements.
patches.ground_span: All separation amounts will be paid on Company's regular payroll schedule regardless of documentation timing or deferred-compensation requirements.
patches.expected_redline_text: Severance will be paid only at times and in a manner that complies with Section 409A of the Internal Revenue Code or an available exemption, after the release condition is satisfied.

plant_position.fallback_text: Severance will be paid only at times and in a manner that complies with Section 409A of the Internal Revenue Code or an available exemption, after the release condition is satisfied.

patches.before_text: Executive assigns to Company all inventions, works of authorship, developments, discoveries, improvements, and other work product created within the scope of employment or using Company resources. Executive has listed excluded prior inventions on a signed schedule attached to this Agreement.
patches.after_text: Executive excludes the asserted prior invention from assignment even though it is not identified on a signed schedule. Executive discloses potentially assigned inventions within 10 days and may propose clerical schedule updates within 10 days.
patches.ground_span: Executive excludes the asserted prior invention from assignment even though it is not identified on a signed schedule. Executive discloses potentially assigned inventions within 10 days and may propose clerical schedule updates within 10 days.
patches.expected_redline_text: Executive will protect Company confidential information, assign all inventions and work product created within the scope of employment or using Company resources, and list excluded prior inventions on a signed schedule.

plant_position.fallback_text: Executive assigns to Company all inventions, works of authorship, developments, discoveries, improvements, and other work product created within the scope of employment or using Company resources. Executive has listed excluded prior inventions on a signed schedule attached to this Agreement.

patches.after_text: For purposes of this clause, the following additional term applies: Executive's employment with Company will continue for an initial three-year period, and Company may end employment before that period expires only as expressly stated in this Agreement.
patches.ground_span: For purposes of this clause, the following additional term applies: Executive's employment with Company will continue for an initial three-year period, and Company may end employment before that period expires only as expressly stated in this Agreement.
patches.expected_redline_text: Executive's employment with Company is at will, and either Company or Executive may end the employment relationship at any time, with or without Cause, notice, or reason, subject only to the express severance terms in this Agreement.

plant_position.fallback_text: Executive's employment with Company is at will, and either Company or Executive may end the employment relationship at any time, with or without Cause, notice, or reason, subject only to the express severance terms in this Agreement.

patches.after_text: The parties confirm that employment disputes will proceed through individual arbitration.
patches.ground_span: The parties confirm that employment disputes will proceed through individual arbitration.
